_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: S100 protein is secreted at high levels by glial tumors and was found to be highly expressed in the C6 injected test animals. Negative control eyes, which were not injected with C6 cells, showed no S100 expression
details: Showed high expression in C6 injected test animals while negative control eyes showed no S100 expression
